_comment: Density-2 sizes 85-96 for Arial/Courier/Times across all style/weight combos. The 94 atlases that exceeded cwebp's 16383px width limit (single-row tight pack) live in this band — italic-bold pervasively, italic-normal/normal-bold sparsely. Generously over-covered: rebuilds ~276 configs total. AtlasBuilder wraps to multi-row only when needed; configs that fit single-row keep the 4-array bundle record shape.
